# Hartha Formation

**Summary**: A Late Cretaceous carbonate formation in southeastern Kuwait.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] analyzed the Hartha Formation as a 50m thick section.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] ranged from restricted platform to platform margin.

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The upper orbitoidal limestone interval is assigned an Early Maastrichtian age. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 99]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] pyritized, ferruginated, and dolomitized.
